name: Feature request
about: Suggest an option, helper, or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

### What's missing

Describe the option, helper, or behavior you'd like. Keep in mind this is
an API-agnostic toolkit — proposals should stay generic to REST clients,
not tied to one specific API.

### Use case

What are you trying to build? This helps shape the right API.

### Proposed shape (optional)

A sketch of the method signature or usage you have in mind:

```go
// ...
```

### Alternatives

Anything you've tried, including the existing `Get`/`Post`/… verbs.
